    JxlsCell
    JxlsSheet.getCell(int column, int row)
    Gets the JxlsCell contained in the cell at position column,row

    JxlsCell
    JxlsSheet.setFormula(int column, int row, String formula)
    Sets the formula at column,row sheet.setFormula(1, 1, "=A1+$A2+$R1C3+R1$C4");
    JxlsCell
    JxlsSheet.setFormula(int column, int row, String formula, JxlsStyle style)
    Sets the formula at column,row sheet.setFormula(1, 1, "=A1+$A2+$R1C3+R1$C4");

    JxlsCell.setHyperlink(String hyperlink)
    Sets the hyperlink associated with this cell
    JxlsCell
    JxlsCell.setSpan(int columnSpan, int rowSpan)
    Sets the span of the cell
    JxlsCell
    JxlsCell.setStyle(JxlsStyle style)
    Sets the style of the cell
